tagline: The managed Workday HCM connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta.
what_it_does: The managed Workday HCM connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta. Use this connector to ingest data from Workday Human Capital Management into Databricks. Beta This feature is in Beta.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: The managed Workday HCM connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta. Use this connector to ingest data from Workday Human Capital Management into Databricks.
key_takeaway: The managed Workday HCM connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta.
